# Access the results from storage
articles_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:6']
amy_articles_count = len(articles_result)

# Analyze articles to categorize them
science_tech_count = 0
categories = []

for article in articles_result:
    title = article.get('title', '').lower()
    description = article.get('description', '').lower()
    
    text_to_analyze = title + ' ' + description
    
    # Check for Science/Technology indicators
    science_tech_keywords = [
        'science', 'technology', 'tech', 'research', 'laboratory', 'experiment',
        'computer', 'software', 'hardware', 'internet', 'digital', 'data',
        'physics', 'chemistry', 'biology', 'mathematics', 'engineering',
        'innovation', 'discovery', 'scientific', 'technical', 'gameboy',
        'competition', 'award', 'energy', 'electricity', 'gyro-gen', 'duke university'
    ]
    
    sports_keywords = ['pro bowl', 'cornerback', 'wide receiver', 'broncos', 'practice', 'game', 'match', 'tournament', 'championship']
    business_keywords = ['company', 'profits', 'mining', 'commodity', 'prices', 'business', 'market', 'economy', 'bhp', 'billiton']
    world_keywords = ['china', 'world', 'global', 'international', 'country', 'nation', 'government', 'political']
    
    is_science_tech = any(keyword in text_to_analyze for keyword in science_tech_keywords)
    is_sports = any(keyword in text_to_analyze for keyword in sports_keywords)
    is_business = any(keyword in text_to_analyze for keyword in business_keywords)
    is_world = any(keyword in text_to_analyze for keyword in world_keywords)
    
    if is_science_tech and not (is_sports or is_business or is_world):
        category = 'Science/Technology'
        science_tech_count += 1
    elif is_sports:
        category = 'Sports'
    elif is_business:
        category = 'Business'
    elif is_world:
        category = 'World'
    elif is_science_tech:  # If it's science/tech but also has other indicators
        category = 'Science/Technology'
        science_tech_count += 1
    else:
        category = 'Other'
    
    categories.append({
        'article_id': article['article_id'],
        'title': article['title'],
        'category': category
    })

# Print results in the required format
fraction = science_tech_count / amy_articles_count if amy_articles_count > 0 else 0

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'total_articles': amy_articles_count,
    'science_tech_count': science_tech_count,
    'fraction': round(fraction, 4)
}))"}

articles_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:6']

# Analyze articles to categorize them

    description = article.get('description', '').lower()
    
    text_to_analyze = title + ' ' + description
    
    # Check for Science/Technology indicators
    science_tech_keywords = [
        'science', 'technology', 'tech', 'research', 'laboratory', 'experiment',
        'computer', 'software', 'hardware', 'internet', 'digital', 'data',
        'physics', 'chemistry', 'biology', 'mathematics', 'engineering',
        'innovation', 'discovery', 'scientific', 'technical', 'gameboy',
        'competition', 'award', 'energy', 'electricity', 'gyro-gen', 'duke university'
    ]
    
    sports_keywords = ['pro bowl', 'cornerback', 'wide receiver', 'broncos', 'practice', 'game', 'match', 'tournament', 'championship']
    business_keywords = ['company', 'profits', 'mining', 'commodity', 'prices', 'business', 'market', 'economy', 'bhp', 'billiton']
    world_keywords = ['china', 'world', 'global', 'international', 'country', 'nation', 'government', 'political']
    
    is_science_tech = any(keyword in text_to_analyze for keyword in science_tech_keywords)
    is_sports = any(keyword in text_to_analyze for keyword in sports_keywords)
    is_business = any(keyword in text_to_analyze for keyword in business_keywords)
    is_world = any(keyword in text_to_analyze for keyword in world_keywords)
    
    if is_science_tech and not (is_sports or is_business or is_world):
        category = 'Science/Technology'
        science_tech_count += 1
    elif is_sports:
        category = 'Sports'
    elif is_business:
        category = 'Business'
    elif is_world:
        category = 'World'
    elif is_science_tech:  # If it's science/tech but also has other indicators
        category = 'Science/Technology'
        science_tech_count += 1
    else:
        category = 'Other'
    
    categories.append({
        'article_id': article['article_id'],
        'title': article['title'],
        'category': category
    })

# Print results in the required format
fraction = science_tech_count / amy_articles_count if amy_articles_count > 0 else 0

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'total_articles': amy_articles_count,
    'science_tech_count': science_tech_count,
    'fraction': round(fraction, 4)
}))"}
